response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack software craftsman with strong web/distributed-systems exposure, but the role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems with deep compute/storage/hardware focus. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months) and primarily TypeScript/Node.js/DLang work, falling far short of the C++ depth and cloud-compute-platform leadership the JD demands.
strengths: Long career with senior/staff titles and mentoring/teaching activity (workshops, dojos, courses)
Distributed/low-latency experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of req/s
Founder-level ownership of an open-source platform deployable on Kubernetes
concerns: Minimal C++ experience — nowhere near the required 8 years
No demonstrated cloud compute platform or large-scale infrastructure leadership
No formal tech-lead role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at the required scale

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and mentoring background
